name: Mach9
evidence_quote: Mach9 accelerates how teams model and understand the world with automated feature extraction technology. Founded in 2021 and headquartered in San Francisco.
decision_note: The YC company description explicitly states founded in 2021 and the page metadata also lists Founded: 2021.

name: Nash
evidence_quote: Nash was founded in 2021 by Mahmoud Ghulman and Aziz Alghunaim.
decision_note: The YC company description explicitly states founded in 2021 and the page metadata also lists Founded: 2021.

name: Parallel Bio
evidence_quote: Based in San Francisco, the company was founded in 2021 by two of the world’s leading experts in replacing animal models with human-first platforms.
decision_note: The YC company description explicitly states founded in 2021 and the page metadata also lists Founded: 2021.

name: Alokai
evidence_quote: Founded in 2021, Alokai (prev. Vue Storefront) ... Founded:2020
decision_note: The description claims 2021, but the same YC page metadata lists Founded: 2020 and the founder history identifies Vue Storefront activity beginning in 2017. Keep the candidate unresolved/out of the 2021-founded cohort pending independent reconciliation.
